observations.summary: The room is uniquely free from shame, characterized by meticulous order and careful placement of possessions.

evidence.quote: Of all the rooms in that house of surrender, this was the only one that did not shame him. Meticulously ordered. A walking stick. A folded blanket. Each possession placed with care.

observations.notes: Indicates a contrast with other rooms and symbolizes personal order and dignity.

observations.summary: The small corner of perfect order serves as hard-won proof that he has put his own house in order before daring to criticize the world.

evidence.quote: A small corner of perfect order—hard-won proof that he had put his own house in order before daring to criticize the world.

observations.notes: This reflects a theme of self-discipline and personal responsibility as prerequisite to judgment.
